polymarket.question: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates by at least 25 basis points before June 30, 2026?
polymarket.description: Outcome resolves to YES if the Federal Reserve lowers the federal funds target by 25 bps or more before June 30, 2026.

polymarket.question: Will Bitcoin reach $100,000 by end of 2026?
polymarket.description: Resolves YES if Bitcoin trades at or above $100,000 on any exchange before December 31, 2026.

kalshi.title: Fed rate cut Q2 2026
kalshi.subtitle: 25bps or more by June 30
kalshi.rules_primary: Settlement criteria: Federal Reserve rate decision by June 30, 2026. Market resolves YES if FOMC cuts the target rate by 25bps or more.

kalshi.title: BTC price $100k by 2026
kalshi.subtitle: Bitcoin to hit $100,000
kalshi.rules_primary: Resolves YES if Bitcoin price reaches $100,000 USD on any major exchange before January 1, 2027.
